The '''WW-47''' was a [[CryoBan grenade/Legends|CryoBan grenade]] produced by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]].

The WW-47 resembled a short stick, with an activation trigger on the side and a timer dial on the pin. This [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]] used the [[CryoBan/Legends|CryoBan]] chemical agent which absorbed all heat on activation, creating a field of freezing cold.

==Appearances==
*''[[Fate of the Jedi: Allies]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Allies (audiobook)}}
